name: Love's Travel Stop #317
description: 24-hour travel stop just north of the NC line with diesel lanes, semi/bobtail truck parking, showers, and on-site McDonald's and Subway.

name: Pilot Travel Center #4651
description: 24-hour Pilot with 7 diesel lanes, roughly 75-85 truck parking spaces, 6 showers, a CAT Scale, and Subway plus Dunkin.

name: Simmons Travel Plaza

name: Pilot Travel Center - Sadler's Emporia
description: Large 24-hour Pilot-branded travel plaza at the US-58 exit with diesel and DEF lanes, showers, restaurant/food, a CAT Scale, and extensive truck parking.

description: Full-service 24-hour travel center (Davis Travel Center reopened as TA Express in Dec 2024) with 7 diesel lanes, about 85 truck spaces, 6 showers, CAT Scale, laundry, Subway and Starbucks.

name: US Gas Truck Stop (Carson)

name: Sheetz (Petersburg Wagner Rd)
description: Truck-friendly Sheetz at Exit 48 offering high-flow diesel lanes with DEF and designated free semi-truck parking, plus made-to-order food and restrooms.

name: Pilot Travel Center #384
description: 24-hour Pilot at the Ruffin Mill exit with 10 fuel lanes, 9 showers, about 110 truck parking spaces, a CAT Scale, and Wendy's.

description: Certified CAT Scale at I-95 & US-301, Exit 8 (Simmons Travel Plaza).

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Sadler's Emporia
description: Certified CAT Scale at I-95 & Hwy 58, Exit 11B (Pilot/Sadler's travel plaza).

name: CAT Scale at TA Express Stony Creek
description: Certified CAT Scale at the TA Express (former Davis Travel Center) at I-95 Exit 33.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Colonial Heights
description: Certified CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #384, I-95 Exit 58 (Ruffin Mill Rd).

name: Carson Weigh Station Northbound
description: Fixed VDMV/Virginia State Police truck weigh and inspection station on I-95 northbound near MM 40 (between exits 37 and 41); offers weigh-in-motion bypass to participating carriers.

name: Carson Weigh Station Southbound
description: Fixed VDMV/Virginia State Police truck weigh and inspection station on I-95 southbound near MM 40 in Prince George County; weigh-in-motion enabled.

name: Virginia Welcome Center (Skippers)
description: VDOT welcome center on I-95 northbound just inside the state line (Greensville County) with restrooms, travel info, vending, picnic and pet areas, and separate car and truck parking.

name: Carson Safety Rest Area
description: VDOT safety rest area on I-95 northbound at MM 37 in Prince George County with about 35 truck/RV/bus spaces plus 100+ car spaces, restrooms, picnic area, and pet area; open 24/7.

name: Colony Tire & Service
description: Commercial tire and fleet service center near I-95 Exit 11 offering truck/commercial tires, fleet maintenance, and 24/7 emergency roadside tire service.

name: Tri-City Wrecker & Auto Repair
description: Family-owned Petersburg towing/recovery operation (since 1974) providing 24/7 heavy-duty semi towing and recovery along the I-95 corridor.

name: Jinks Motor Carriers Heavy Towing & Recovery
description: 24/7 heavy-duty towing, recovery, and emergency roadside service operating across the Petersburg I-95 area.

name: Road Safety CDL Training School

name: Shippers' Choice Truck Driving School - Petersburg
description: Established Class A CDL training provider with a Petersburg-area campus serving the I-95 corridor.

name: CDS Tractor Trailer Training - Richmond
description: Class A CDL training center located just off I-95 in the Richmond area, serving Central Virginia including Chesterfield and Petersburg.

name: Flying J Travel Plaza #749 (Carmel Church)
description: Full-service Flying J truck stop at I-95 Exit 104 with roughly 240 truck parking spaces, 12 diesel lanes, showers, Denny's and Cinnabon. Open 24 hours with an on-site CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #435 (Ruther Glen)
description: Love's Travel Stop at I-95 Exit 104 with diesel lanes, truck parking, a restaurant, showers and an on-site CAT Scale. Open 24 hours.

name: TA Ashland (TravelCenters of America)

name: TA Richmond (TravelCenters of America)

name: Sheetz #672 (Woodford/Thornburg)

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Carmel Church
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Flying J Travel Plaza at I-95 Exit 104 for certified truck weighing.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Ruther Glen
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Love's Travel Stop #435 at I-95 Exit 104 for certified truck weighing.

name: CAT Scale at TA Ashland
description: Certified CAT Scale at the TA Ashland travel center at I-95 Exit 92 for certified truck weighing.

name: Dumfries Weigh Station (Southbound)
description: Virginia DMV fixed weigh and vehicle-inspection station on I-95 southbound at Mile 154 near Dumfries/Montclair. Offers weigh-in-motion and accepts PrePass.

name: Dumfries Weigh Station (Northbound)
description: Virginia DMV fixed weigh/inspection station on I-95 northbound near Dumfries, paired with the southbound MM 154 facility.

name: Ladysmith Safety Rest Area (Southbound)

name: Ladysmith Safety Rest Area (Northbound)
description: VDOT safety rest area on I-95 northbound near Mile 108 in Caroline County with car and truck/RV/bus parking and restrooms, open 24/7.

name: Fredericksburg Welcome Center (Southbound)

name: Dale City Safety Rest Area (Northbound)
description: VDOT safety rest area on I-95 northbound at Mile 154 in Prince William County with truck/RV/bus parking and restrooms, open 24/7.

name: Dale City Truck Rest Area (Southbound)
description: VDOT truck-designated rest area on I-95 southbound at Mile 155 in Prince William County providing dedicated truck parking, open 24/7 (paired with the car-only facility at the same milepost).

name: Service Tire Truck Center (STTC) Fredericksburg

name: 2020 Truck and Trailer Repair
description: Commercial truck and trailer shop offering tire repair/replacement and 24/7 mobile roadside assistance along I-95, US-17 and Route 3 in the Fredericksburg area.

name: 95 Truck & Trailer Repair
description: Commercial truck and trailer repair shop near I-95 in Fredericksburg handling heavy-duty truck and trailer service and tire work.

name: Franco Road Service Inc
description: 24-hour mobile roadside service for semi-truck and trailer breakdowns on the I-95 corridor, including new/used tires and suspension repair.

name: Liberty Fleet Solutions (Liberty Equipment)
description: Heavy/medium/light-duty truck repair facility with multiple service bays and diesel mechanics offering tire service and mobile support near I-95 in Fredericksburg.

name: CDS Tractor Trailer Training (Fredericksburg)
description: DMV-approved CDL training center just off I-95 Exit 118 (Thornburg) offering a roughly 4-week Class A program with range and on-road instruction.

name: Truck N Learn CDL Training

name: Days Inn Carmel Church / Ruther Glen
description: Hotel at I-95 Exit 104 that provides free parking with space for trucks, buses and RVs, plus free breakfast, Wi-Fi and 24-hour front desk.
